svg.title: LithePG v1.0 release gate empty BASH_ENV hardening receipt
svg.desc: Visual evidence for the 2026-06-02 v10 release gate hardening commit: empty-but-present BASH_ENV now fails closed after sanitizer marker, with test and dogfood verification results.
svg.text: v1.0 release gate: empty BASH_ENV fail-closed hardening
Commit evidence artifact • no signing, notarization, upload, release, tag, cron, or Telegram action attempted
✓ Regression now covered: LITHEPG_V10_RELEASE_GATE_STARTUP_ENV_SANITIZED=1 + BASH_ENV="" exits 2 before usage output
• Treats BASH_ENV presence (${BASH_ENV+x}), including empty value, as sanitizer-needed
• Post-sanitizer guard fails closed if any BASH_ENV key remains
• Adds empty-BASH_ENV fail-closed test with exit 2 and no normal --help Usage output
✓ bash script/test_create_release_zip.sh; bash script/test_sign_and_notarize.sh; bash -n script/*.sh
✓ git diff --check; swift build; swift test — 127 Swift tests / 20 suites passed
Dogfood metrics: shell 131.53 ms • connected 275.03 ms • raw 21.379 MiB • strip 11.980 MiB • SELECT 1 overhead 0.015 ms
